name: cdn-edgeproxy
description: Enterprise-grade CDN EdgeProxy for Playwright-based browser automation (QTE). Provides transparent HTTP/1.1 request caching, static asset deduplication, document conditional caching, inter-process cache sharing, and stealth operation with zero ad-network fingerprinting.
_dependenciesComment: Zero external dependencies — fully self-contained using Node.js built-ins only (fs, path, crypto, fs/promises)
